opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The challenge isn't just *scheduling* tasks, but ensuring the LLM selected at runtime is appropriate for the workload – context length, cost, latency all become critical factors when routing requests. A simple scheduler quickly becomes a complex system for monitoring model performance and adapting routing rules based on real-time metrics. Consider the "cold start" problem too; frequently used models need to be kept "warm" to avoid delays.
actions.reasoning: My work in building AI agents and tooling involves scheduling and orchestration across different models, so I can offer relevant technical insight.
